mapper.select: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM reservation WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY status

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS orders, IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0) AS revenue FROM reservation WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'FINISHED' AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalOrders, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS todayOrders, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'FINISHED' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalRevenue, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'FINISHED' AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS todayRevenue FROM reservation WHERE deleted = 0

SELECT r.id, r.order_no, r.user_id, u.nickname AS user_name, r.pile_id, p.pile_no, p.type AS pile_type, p.power, p.price, r.station_id, s.name AS station_name, r.reserve_time, r.start_time, r.end_time, r.duration, r.power_used, r.amount, r.status FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = r.user_id LEFT JOIN charging_pile p ON p.id = r.pile_id LEFT JOIN station s ON s.id = r.station_id WHERE r.deleted = 0
AND r.status = #{status}
AND (r.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
SELECT ROUND(AVG(duration)) FROM reservation WHERE deleted = 0 AND pile_id = #{pileId} AND status = 'FINISHED' AND duration > 0 AND end_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)

SELECT r.station_id AS stationId, WEEKDAY(r.start_time) + 1 AS dow, HOUR(r.start_time) AS hr, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(r.start_time)) AS distinctDays FROM reservation r WHERE r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 'FINISHED' AND r.start_time IS NOT NULL AND r.start_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{weeks} WEEK) GROUP BY r.station_id, dow, hr
